name: activity_rolling_window_contract
description: Structural contract for ActivityLog rolling windows. TODO(T2b): exercise this through an ActivityLog emitter or dedicated internal test surface once always-on event emission is available.
expectationNote: The shared writer rotates before append when either cap is reached: 5000 entries or 10 MB. It preserves the same sessionId and renames the current file to <sessionId>.<rolloverIndex>.jsonl starting at 1.
